scripts.kill: pnpm kill:web; pnpm kill:server; pnpm kill:desktop; pnpm kill:bun-server; echo 'all dev ports cleared'
scripts.kill:web: lsof -nP -iTCP -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | grep -E ':(517[0-9])\b' | awk '{print $2}' | sort -u | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ 前端端口已清理'
scripts.kill:server: lsof -nP -iTCP -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | grep ':8000 ' | awk '{print $2}' | sort -u | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ 后端端口已清理'
scripts.kill:desktop: lsof -nP -iTCP -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | grep -E ':(1800[0-9])\b' | awk '{print $2}' | sort -u | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ 桌面端端口已清理'
scripts.kill:bun-server: lsof -nP -iTCP -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | grep ':3999 ' | awk '{print $2}' | sort -u | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Bun 服务端口已清理'
